text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our summer training camp is in full swing, and Curren is out training
under the blazing heat of the sun.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo hooot... Too tired...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I might be allergic to the heat... I'm melting away...
choice_data_list: Let's just do as much as we can!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then how about this... If I try real hard, will you go on a date with
me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, there's a festival happening tonight. If you promise that
you'll go with me, then I think I might just be okay...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hint hint. ♥

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hooray! ☆ I feel completely refreshed now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Ahhhh! ♪ Hehe, we're going to a festival! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, Curren trains through the heat... Though to be honest, it
doesn't look like it's bothering her at all. But I can't go back on a
promise, so...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Brooo! ♪ Look, look—they have candied apples!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! ♪ Look, look—they have candied apples!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Red, round, and shiny... They're sooo cute! If only I could get one...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yippee! Thanks a bunch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Mister, one candied apple, pleeease. Oh, and do you mind if I take a
pic with your stand, too?

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, cute missy! Go ahead—that is, if my lil' stand is good
enough for you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay, thanks a bunch, mister! Let's get all these candied apples in the
shot with me, aaand...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap, snap!

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh, I like your style! Here, take another apple—it's on the house!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! Your lovely smile is more than payment enough, missy.
Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Festivalgoer A
text_block_list.text: Hey hey, isn't she, like, super cute? We should get a candied apple too!

text_block_list.name: Festivalgoer B
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I'm suddenly craving one too! Let's get a pic while we're
at it!

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Having you eat at my stand is working wonders for bringing in the
customers!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ Then, don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Bro, I got an extra candied apple for you! Let's take a pic
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Sis, I got an extra candied apple for you! Let's take a pic
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap, snap!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#SummerFestival #SoHappy #FestivalLove #SummerLove" Hehe, I
wonder if everyone'll like my smile? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue accompanying Curren as she enjoys the sights and smells of
the summer festival.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro! Next up, can we—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis! Next up, can we—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's all this commotion about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Peeeeew... Boom!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh... fireworks? Sheesh, that surprised me...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. You're... right.

text_block_list.name: Festivalgoer A
text_block_list.text: Wow, the fireworks are so beautiful! Gorgeous, even.

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: Man, they went all out this year. Look, another one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dazzling fireworks light up the night sky. Soon, nearly all the
festivalgoers are gazing happily at the display. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I look over at Curren, her expression is clouded over...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Bro, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Sis, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren turns her back on the fireworks and leads me away from the
crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, we arrive at a moonlit beach.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You know, I... don't like fireworks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little taken aback. I never thought I'd hear the perpetually
positive Curren Chan declare that she simply "doesn't like" something.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whenever fireworks go off, everyone looks up at them, don't they?
Even though I'm right down here...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They're flashy, loud, and total scene-stealers. They snatch away all
the attention I've worked so hard to earn.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, that frustrated me to tears. That's why... I made a
promise to myself.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That I would become cuter than those fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose to those sparkly fireworks. I'll shine brighter—fly higher
than any of them can ever hope to!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll steal back the spotlight and make everyone look at me. One day, the whole world will have their eyes glued on me alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an ambitious dream to say the least, but Curren's voice brims with
confidence. After a moment of silence, she looks straight at me with a
keen, inquiring gaze.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro. What do you think of me right now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis. What do you think of me right now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, the boom of the fireworks and the faint, shimmering
moonlight both fade into the background, leaving only her glittering
eyes in front of mine.
choice_data_list: You're cuter than any of those fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thanks, Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thanks, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Finally... I got to hear you call me cute in your own words! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Finally... I got to hear you call me cute in your own words! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Bro, you've been thinking about me a lot lately, haven't you?
About how you want to know and understand me better.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Sis, you've been thinking about me a lot lately, haven't you?
About how you want to know and understand me better.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, hey... Why not keep thinking about me, and only me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh, you're not getting away! You're staying with me until I'm
satisfied, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Tonight, I'll let you have me all to yourself. Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this was all just another one of Curren's pranks. Maybe all she
wanted was for me to tell her how cute she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But maybe, just maybe... I feel like I might have caught a glimpse of
the real Curren shining through today.
